creator: Ezekiel38-39@mail.com
text:
I got a message using the terminal to update.

"The cups-pdf port currently does not have a maintainer."
"The Prison port currently does not have maintainer."
" The hupnp port curently does not have a maintainer"

I don't know what this means.

Also I just installed P-BSD 10.3 on this computer replacing Windows. The update manager does not seem to complete the update saying "unable to determine system status Auto update security& packages"
 
This  after it appears to have finished updating, 

Using the  terminal the update seems to work because it reports all packages are up to date.
